query:
INSERT INTO debounce_key (job_id, key)
             VALUES ($1, $2)
             ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET
                 job_id = EXCLUDED.job_id,
                 previous_job_id = NULL,
                 debounced_times = 0,
                 first_started_at = now()
             RETURNING debounced_times, first_started_at
